rows.label: qev058803_MSG0001
rows.name:
Honestly... Noborata and Chikochiko are hopeless.
Slacking off every day without looking for work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Me? I'm... chatting in the plaza every day like this,
investigating folks from other planets. You got a problem with that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Sorry, I'm a bit tied up right now.
I'm teaching this Orphean how to tame beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0004
rows.name:
But can a bug-like... or rather, food-like alien like this
actually pull off taming?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0005
rows.name: If it were a Bias, they could definitely tame a beast of that caliber.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0006
rows.name:
However... whether a bug-like, or rather, food-like alien can do it...
We won't know until he tries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0007
rows.name:
Will Min'boiton be alright?
He's kind of, you know, food-like, so I'm a bit worried.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev058803_MSG0008
rows.name: Maybe we should go check on him... later?[ST:wait ]
